title: How Anthropic Employees ACTUALLY Use Claude Code to Grow
summary: Austin Marchese analyzes how Anthropic's Growth Team leveraged Claude Code to achieve rapid scaling from $1B to $19B valuation in 14 months. He identifies four primary strategies: automating existing workflows, enabling sub-threshold work, building bespoke tools, and using AI as a thought partner, while warning against productivity inversions.
